files.patch:
@@ -66,8 +66,11 @@ jobs:
   g2-clippy:
     name: G2 clippy
     needs: g1-format
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     timeout-minutes: 25
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
@@ -80,8 +83,11 @@ jobs:
   g3-rust-tests:
     name: G3 rust tests
     needs: g2-clippy
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     timeout-minutes: 30
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
